_comment: Tiny synthetic dataset for the comparison harness's smoke run. Real eval data lives in Postgres (eval_datasets / eval_cases) and is loaded via --dataset-id at run time. This file is only a fallback so the harness can do a self-check end-to-end without a live DB.
name: smoke-fixture

cases.input_query: How does RBAC work in this system?
cases.expected_answer: RBAC is enforced at retrieval time. Every Postgres query carries the tenant_id via SET LOCAL app.current_tenant_id, and the hybrid retriever injects an authorized-collections CTE before candidates are fetched.

cases.input_query: What does HNSW give us over IVFFlat?
cases.expected_answer: HNSW supports per-query ef_search tuning, has better recall at small k, and avoids the IVFFlat training step. We picked it in ADR-0003.

cases.input_query: When does the cost gate downgrade a request?
cases.expected_answer: The cost gate runs after retrieval/rerank, before generation. If the soft-cap is crossed it rebinds the LiteLLM generator to a cheaper model in the per-tenant downgrade ladder; if the hard-cap is crossed it raises BudgetExceededError (HTTP 402).
